subcodes.first_line: O skilled poet! Thy verses are even as luminous pearls outpoured, the fruit of that faithful friend's innate genius [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر ماهر اشعار بمثابه لئالی پرتو نثار بود و نتیجه قریحه آن یار وفادار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
